name: website-finder-project
description: Local website finder for nearby local businesses

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix client && npm install --prefix server
scripts.dev: concurrently -n "server,client" -c "blue,green" "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.start: concurrently -n "server,client" -c "blue,green" "npm run start --prefix server" "npm run preview --prefix client"
